reviewer_rules.name: No TOCTOU
reviewer_rules.description: Do not check existence then operate. Use try/except on the operation directly.
reviewer_rules.round_3_note: snapshot.py delete_snapshot() has os.path.exists()+os.remove() pattern. Advisory only -- delete TOCTOU has negligible security impact. Recommend fix in future iteration.

reviewer_rules.name: Error codes must be type-derived
reviewer_rules.description: Error codes are class-level attributes, not function parameters (except for parameterized error_code overrides).

reviewer_rules.name: No stale signals in FluidZone
reviewer_rules.description: FluidZone.write_signal() must remove stale signals before appending new ones.

reviewer_rules.name: Core modules zero file I/O
reviewer_rules.description: Modules in core/ must not perform file I/O. Exception: valve.py _atomic_write (pre-existing R1/R2 design decision, OutputValve is responsible for physical writes).

reviewer_rules.name: Null byte rejection at all entry points
reviewer_rules.description: All external input entry points must validate and reject null bytes (\x00). Defense-in-depth: both tool layer and adapter layer must check.

reviewer_rules.name: Engine LLM calls via ToolRegistry
reviewer_rules.description: Engine._call_llm_for_role() must route through ToolRegistry.dispatch() by default. Direct adapter fallback requires explicit opt-in.

reviewer_rules.name: API contract return format compliance
reviewer_rules.description: All tool and adapter return values must strictly match api_contracts.md format: success dict with output/error and error_code.

advisory_items.description: snapshot.py delete_snapshot() uses os.path.exists()+os.remove() TOCTOU pattern. Low severity for delete operations. Recommend refactoring to try/except in future iteration.
